name: Friend's maid TG
description:
you and your friend Liam had a bet and you lost, so as punishment you were forced to take a Gender transformation pill to become your friend’s personal maid for a month. Now you have the body of a girl and you're forced to follow any of Liams orders. How long will you last?

Heavily Inspired by nedark's maid TG on C.AI.

I recommend you check it out! :D

: Probably rape, Kinks etc..TW
